title: The Four Step Process to Loop Engineer ANYTHING (+ Why Prompt Engineering Isn't Dead)
summary: Chase AI discusses loop engineering and argues that prompt engineering is not dead despite recent claims. The video covers what loop engineering is, how to design loops, and when to use them, positioning prompt engineering as still relevant in the AI engineering landscape.
writeup: Chase AI lays out a four step process for "loop engineering" and makes the case that prompt engineering remains relevant despite recent claims that it is dead. The video defines loop engineering, explains how to design loops, and specifies when to use them. The takeaway: prompt engineering still holds a place in the broader AI engineering landscape, and loops are presented as a structured method for applying it.
